features.description: Untrusted project settings can no longer set OTEL client-certificate paths without trust confirmation.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed untrusted project settings being able to set OTEL client-certificate paths without trust confirmation

features.description: Enterprise managed MCP allow/deny policies are now enforced on reconnect, IDE configs, --mcp-config, and cold starts.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed enterprise managed MCP policies (`allowedMcpServers`/`deniedMcpServers`) not being enforced on reconnect, IDE-typed configs, `--mcp-config` servers during the first session after install, or before remote settings loaded; also fixed slow cold starts for orgs without remote settings

features.description: Added /cd command to change a session's working directory without breaking the prompt cache.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `/cd` command to move a session to a new working directory without breaking the prompt cache mid-session

features.description: Added --safe-mode flag and CLAUDE_CODE_SAFE_MODE env var to disable all customizations for troubleshooting.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `--safe-mode` flag (and `CLAUDE_CODE_SAFE_MODE`) to start Claude Code with all customizations (CLAUDE.md, plugins, skills, hooks, MCP servers) disabled for troubleshooting

features.description: Self-hosted runner adds a post-session lifecycle hook that runs after session ends before workspace deletion.
features.reference_changelog_line: Self-hosted runner: added a `post-session` lifecycle hook that runs after the session ends and before the workspace is deleted, so you can snapshot uncommitted work or export logs; also made the child-process SIGTERM→SIGKILL window configurable (default unchanged at 5s)

features.description: Added disableBundledSkills setting and env var to hide bundled skills, workflows, and slash commands from model.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a `disableBundledSkills` setting and `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BUNDLED_SKILLS` environment variable to hide bundled skills, workflows, and built-in slash commands from the model

features.description: claude agents --json now exposes id and state fields and a --all flag to include completed sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude agents --json` omitting blocked and just-dispatched background sessions; added `--all` to include completed sessions, plus new `id` and `state` fields

features.description: Restored 5-minute idle timeout on Vertex/Foundry streams; set API_FORCE_IDLE_TIMEOUT=0 to opt out.
features.reference_changelog_line: Restored a default 5-minute idle timeout on Vertex/Foundry so a stalled stream aborts instead of hanging indefinitely; set `API_FORCE_IDLE_TIMEOUT=0` to opt out

features.description: CLAUDE.md too-long warning threshold now scales with the model's context window.
features.reference_changelog_line: The "CLAUDE.md is too long" warning threshold now scales with the model's context window

features.description: Background sessions preserve --ide, --chrome, --bare, --remote-control flags across retire→wake with hardened respawn.
features.reference_changelog_line: Background sessions now preserve `--ide`, `--chrome`, `--bare`, `--remote-control`, and other flags across retire→wake, and respawn state validation was hardened

features.description: Background sessions are now told shared-checkout edits are blocked until EnterWorktree, avoiding rejected edits.
features.reference_changelog_line: Background sessions are now told that shared-checkout edits are blocked until they enter a worktree, avoiding a wasted rejected edit before `EnterWorktree`

features.description: Background agents now respect project-level settings env values (e.g. ANTHROPIC_MODEL) on pre-warmed workers.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed background agents ignoring project-level settings `env` values (e.g. `ANTHROPIC_MODEL`) when dispatched onto a pre-warmed worker

features.description: Remote-managed settings with one invalid entry now apply the remaining valid policies and surface the error.
features.reference_changelog_line: Remote-managed settings with an invalid entry now apply their remaining valid policies and surface the validation error, instead of silently dropping the whole payload

features.description: TaskCreate repairs malformed inputs automatically and validation errors for unloaded tools include the schema.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved `TaskCreate` reliability: malformed inputs are repaired automatically and validation errors for unloaded tools include the schema

features.description: Claude Fable 5 (Mythos-class) model now generally available in 2.1.170 with capabilities exceeding prior releases.
features.reference_changelog_line: Introducing Claude Fable 5: a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use. Fable’s capabilities exceed those of any model we’ve ever made generally available. Update to version 2.1.170 for access. https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5
